creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
note: deleting and recreating file worked.

cd /var/db/unofficial-dbs
(or where ever you keep your unofficial cache)
rm -rf
cd /var/db/clamav
rm all NON CLAMAV SIGS
run your unoffcial script.
clamscan and clamdscan now work as expected.
